ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the script or batch file */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the script started executing */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the script finished executing */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Total execution time of the script in seconds */,
  "overhead_time" REAL /* Overhead time associated with the script execution in seconds */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during script execution in MB */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during script execution in percentage */,
  "error_logs" TEXT /* Error logs or exceptions that occurred during execution */,
  "additional_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics for performance analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the script */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment in which the script was executed */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mappings" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scripts" (
  "script_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each script or batch file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Full path to the script or batch file */,
  "script_name" TEXT /* Name of the script or batch file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the script or batch file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the script was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp when the script was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)
